title: selago capitellata
intro: Selago capitellata, also known as Cape vygie, is a succulent plant species native to the Western Cape region of South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and alleviating respiratory issues, and has been used in herbal preparations to treat coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Selago capitellata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for its antiseptic properties.
